reviews.comment:
Una parada obligada cuando voy a la Costa Atlántica y a través de los años siempre se mantuvo firme con la limpieza, mantenimiento y buena atención.

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop when I go to the Atlantic Coast and over the years it has always remained steadfast in its cleanliness, maintenance and good service.

reviews.comment:
Un desastre. El Full no acepta pagos con la app de YPF. Por lo tanto si pensás en parar y aprovechar descuentos, olvidate... Seguí a la estación del área de servicios central.
Pedí una lágrima... Y era horrible. Casi nada de leche. Ni siquiera buen sabor a café.

(Translated by Google)
A disaster. The Full station doesn't accept payments with the YPF app. So if you're thinking of stopping and taking advantage of discounts, forget it... Just keep going to the station in the central service area. I ordered a "lágrima" (a type of coffee)... and it was awful. Hardly any milk. Not even a decent coffee flavor.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTN3BHb1dREAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atención y lugar para estirar las piernas a mitad de camino entre Bs.As. Costa Atlántica.

Good service and a place to stretch your legs halfway between Buenos Aires and the Atlantic Coast.

reviews.comment:
Lugar para hacer un descanso con amplio espacio para estacionar arbolado y con instalaciones para picnic, estación de servicio, salón comedor y cafetería con pelotero juegos para niños.

(Translated by Google)
A place to take a break with ample parking, trees, picnic facilities, a service station, a dining room and a cafeteria with a ball pit and children's games.
